Title format: "RFC SFF-RFC-XXXX: <title>"

Read CONTRIBUTING.md before opening this PR if you haven't already.
-->

## RFC

- **ID:** SFF-RFC-XXXX
- **Working Group:** WG-XX
- **State:** Pre-Draft / Draft / Last Call / Candidate Recommendation
- **Authors:** @your-github-handle

## Summary

One-paragraph description of what this PR changes.

## Type of change

- [ ] New RFC (Pre-Draft)
- [ ] Working Group accepting Pre-Draft → Draft
- [ ] Draft revision
- [ ] Advance to Last Call
- [ ] Last Call comment disposition
- [ ] Advance to Candidate Recommendation
- [ ] Advance to Final (ratification)
- [ ] Errata
- [ ] Editorial-only

## Checklist

- [ ] Front-matter (`id`, `title`, `state`, `working_group`, `working_group_slug`, `authors`) is filled in and accurate.
- [ ] `updated` date in the front-matter has been bumped.
- [ ] If advancing state, the relevant voting threshold from `CONTRIBUTING.md` is met and the vote is recorded in this PR.
- [ ] Discussion in this PR follows the [Antitrust Policy](https://software-factory-foundation-site.vercel.app/governance/antitrust-policy).

## Notes for reviewers

What should the Working Group focus on? Any decisions you'd specifically like a vote or comment on?
